---
mode: agent
description: "AgToosa: plan → run → report → triage: unit, integration, E2E, browser, a11y, performance"
tools: [codebase, terminal]
---

Read Docs/AgToosa_QA.md and execute the QA workflow.

Sub-command dispatch:
- No argument → full QA workflow
- `plan` → create QA test plan for the active spec
- `run` → execute the full test suite
- `report` → generate QA report
- `triage` → triage failing tests with Iron Law root-cause protocol
